name: O-7 per-rule canary: every state transition appends an entry to rule_state_history with timestamp/from/to/reason
command: mkdir -p tree rubric/fp-log && : > rubric/fp-log/g-ts-test.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/canary-promote.sh" --rule-id g-ts-test --to block --tree "$PWD/tree" --now 2026-05-30T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'rule_state_history:' tree/google/x.yaml && grep -q 'from: warn-only' tree/google/x.yaml && grep -q 'to: block' tree/google/x.yaml && echo history_appended 1>&2
